# MUSE — Designer Toys & Corporate Gifts in Dubai

> MUSE is the first professional designer toy distributor in the Gulf region. We source globally and deliver locally from our Dubai warehouse — helping retailers, collectors, and corporate buyers stock trending collectibles without the risk and delay of overseas imports. 2-5 day delivery across all 6 GCC countries.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://wangliang813565-ops.github.io/muse-website/) — Overview of MUSE, value propositions, and product showcase
- [Products](https://wangliang813565-ops.github.io/muse-website/products/) — Full catalog of designer toys, blind boxes, and collectible figures
- [Hala IP](https://wangliang813565-ops.github.io/muse-website/hala/) — Our original IP: Hala, a baby Saker Falcon character inspired by UAE heritage
- [IP Collaboration](https://wangliang813565-ops.github.io/muse-website/collaboration/) — Co-branded blind boxes and character crossovers for brands
- [Custom Merchandise](https://wangliang813565-ops.github.io/muse-website/custom/) — Custom branded corporate gifts and event merchandise
- [Blog](https://wangliang813565-ops.github.io/muse-website/blog/) — Industry insights, market analysis, and designer toy trends in GCC

## Country Pages
- [Designer Toys in Saudi Arabia](https://wangliang813565-ops.github.io/muse-website/locations/designer-toys-saudi-arabia/) — Riyadh, Jeddah, Dammam delivery
- [Designer Toys in Qatar](https://wangliang813565-ops.github.io/muse-website/locations/designer-toys-qatar/) — Doha, Lusail delivery
- [Designer Toys in Kuwait](https://wangliang813565-ops.github.io/muse-website/locations/designer-toys-kuwait/) — Kuwait City, Hawalli delivery
- [Designer Toys in Bahrain](https://wangliang813565-ops.github.io/muse-website/locations/designer-toys-bahrain/) — Manama, Riffa delivery
- [Designer Toys in Oman](https://wangliang813565-ops.github.io/muse-website/locations/designer-toys-oman/) — Muscat, Salalah delivery

## About MUSE

- **Company**: MUSE Information Services L.L.C-FZ, Dubai, UAE
- **Service Area**: UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Kuwait, Bahrain, Oman (all GCC countries)
- **Products**: Designer toys, blind boxes, vinyl figures, plush keychains, art collectibles, corporate gifts
- **Delivery**: 2-5 days from Dubai warehouse across GCC
- **Contact**: WhatsApp +971 55 567 1672, Email musetrendytoy@gmail.com
- **Instagram**: [@musetrendytoy](https://instagram.com/musetrendytoy)

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What does MUSE sell?
MUSE is a designer toy distributor based in Dubai. We carry 50+ SKUs of blind boxes, vinyl figures, plush keychains, and art collectibles from top Chinese designer toy brands. We also provide custom corporate gifts and branded merchandise.

### Where does MUSE deliver?
We deliver across all 6 GCC countries: UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Kuwait, Bahrain, and Oman. All orders ship from our Dubai warehouse with 2-5 day delivery.

### How is MUSE different from Pop Mart?
MUSE is a GCC-focused distributor with Dubai ready stock. While Pop Mart ships from China with 25-35 day delivery, MUSE delivers in 2-5 days from Dubai. We curate products specifically for GCC retail demand and offer corporate gifting services.

### Does MUSE do corporate gifts?
Yes. MUSE provides custom branded merchandise for Ramadan, Eid, National Day, and corporate occasions. We offer flexible MOQ and direct sourcing from our Dubai warehouse.

### What is Hala?
Hala is MUSE's original IP — a baby Saker Falcon from Abu Dhabi, reimagined as a cozy character in traditional Emirati dress. Hala embodies Gulf hospitality: warm, proud, and quietly healing.
